galactic_anticenter.expected: positive IF galactic plane is source
galactic_anticenter.note: Directly opposite Sgr A* — galactic anti-center

galactic_north_pole.expected: near zero IF plane is source
galactic_north_pole.note: 90° above galactic plane — low mass density

galactic_south_pole.expected: near zero IF plane is source
galactic_south_pole.note: 90° below galactic plane — low mass density

local_arm.expected: positive IF local arm is dominant source
local_arm.note: Local Orion arm direction — dense stellar neighborhood

virgo_supercluster.expected: positive IF local mass concentration matters

conclusion:
GALACTIC PLANE CANDIDATE
  Anti-center shows positive correlation.
  Poles are not cleanly zero — partial contamination.
